# Tiny Design

> A friendly UI component set for React

Tiny Design (`@tiny-design/react`) is a comprehensive React UI component library with 80+ components, built with TypeScript, supporting theming via `ConfigProvider` and design tokens.

- Docs: https://wangdicoder.github.io/tiny-design/
- GitHub: https://github.com/wangdicoder/tiny-design
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tiny-design/react

## Installation

```bash
npm install @tiny-design/react
# or
pnpm add @tiny-design/react
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { Button, Modal, Table } from '@tiny-design/react';
import '@tiny-design/react/es/style.css'; // import styles
```

## Theming

Use `ConfigProvider` to customize the prefix class name and theme mode:

```tsx
import { ConfigProvider } from '@tiny-design/react';

<ConfigProvider prefixCls="my-app" themeMode="dark">
  <App />
</ConfigProvider>
```

Design tokens are available via `@tiny-design/tokens` (SCSS variables and CSS custom properties).

## Base Props

All components extend `BaseProps`:

- `style?: CSSProperties` ‚Äî inline styles
- `className?: string` ‚Äî CSS class
- `prefixCls?: string` ‚Äî CSS class prefix (default: `ty-`)

All components support `React.forwardRef` for ref forwarding.

## Size System

Components that accept sizes use: `'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'`

## CSS Conventions

- Class prefix: `ty-` (e.g., `.ty-btn`, `.ty-modal`)
- BEM naming: `ty-component`, `ty-component__element`, `ty-component_modifier`

## Components

### Foundation
- **Button** ‚Äî Trigger operations. Props: `variant` (`'solid'|'outline'|'ghost'|'link'`), `color` (`'default'|'primary'|'info'|'danger'|'warning'|'success'`), `loading`, `disabled`, `block`, `size`, `round`, `icon`. Also: `Button.Group`.
- **Image** ‚Äî Display images with preview support.
- **Link** ‚Äî Styled anchor element.
- **Typography** ‚Äî Headings, body text, lists. Prefer `Heading`, `Text`, `Paragraph`; compatibility entrypoints: `Typography.Heading`, `Typography.Text`, `Typography.Paragraph`.

### Layout
- **AspectRatio** ‚Äî Maintain width-to-height proportional relationship.
- **Divider** ‚Äî Separate content sections. Props: `direction` (`'horizontal'|'vertical'`).
- **Flex** ‚Äî Flexbox container with CSS `gap` spacing.
- **Grid** ‚Äî 24-column grid system. `Grid.Row` + `Grid.Col` with `span`, `offset`, `push`, `pull`.
- **Layout** ‚Äî Page layout. Subcomponents: `Layout.Header`, `Layout.Content`, `Layout.Footer`, `Layout.Sider`.
- **Space** ‚Äî Set spacing between components. Props: `size`, `direction`, `wrap`.
- **Split** ‚Äî Draggable split pane.
- **Waterfall** ‚Äî Masonry/waterfall layout distributing items across columns.

### Navigation
- **Anchor** ‚Äî Hyperlinks for scrolling within a page.
- **Breadcrumb** ‚Äî Show current location in hierarchy.
- **Dropdown** ‚Äî Drop-down list with menu items.
- **Menu** ‚Äî Navigation menu with dropdown support. Props: `mode` (`'horizontal'|'vertical'|'inline'`).
- **Pagination** ‚Äî Page through data sets. Props: `total`, `current`, `pageSize`, `onChange`.
- **SpeedDial** ‚Äî Floating action button expanding to actions.
- **Steps** ‚Äî Wizard-like numbered step navigation.

### Data Display
- **Avatar** ‚Äî Represent people/objects with `image`, `Icon`, or `letter`.
- **Badge** ‚Äî Numerical value or status indicator. Props: `count`, `dot`, `overflowCount`.
- **Calendar** ‚Äî Date display and selection.
- **Card** ‚Äî Rectangular container. Props: `title`, `extra`, `cover`, `variant`.
- **Carousel** ‚Äî Slideshow cycling through elements.
- **Collapse** ‚Äî Expandable/collapsible content panels.
- **Countdown** ‚Äî Countdown timer component.
- **Descriptions** ‚Äî Display read-only field groups.
- **Empty** ‚Äî Empty state placeholder.
- **Flip** ‚Äî Two-sided flip box.
- **List** ‚Äî Simple list for displaying item collections.
- **Marquee** ‚Äî Infinite horizontal scrolling content.
- **Popover** ‚Äî Floating card on click/hover. Props: `content`, `title`, `trigger`, `placement`.
- **Progress** ‚Äî Operation progress display. Props: `percent`, `type` (`'line'|'circle'`).
- **ScrollNumber** ‚Äî Animated rolling number transitions.
- **Statistic** ‚Äî Formatted statistic number with title.
- **Table** ‚Äî Tabular data with sorting, selection, pagination. Props: `columns`, `dataSource`, `rowKey`, `rowSelection`, `pagination`, `loading`, `bordered`, `virtual`.
- **Tag** ‚Äî Categorizing markup. Props: `color`, `closable`.
- **TextLoop** ‚Äî Cycle text with slide transitions.
- **Timeline** ‚Äî Display a timeline of events.
- **Tooltip** ‚Äî Simple text popup on hover. Props: `title`, `placement`, `trigger`.
- **Tree** ‚Äî Hierarchical list structure.

### Form
- **AutoComplete** ‚Äî Input with autocomplete suggestions.
- **Cascader** ‚Äî Multi-level dropdown for hierarchical data.
- **Checkbox** ‚Äî Multiple selection. `Checkbox.Group` for managing groups.
- **ColorPicker** ‚Äî Color selection with spectrum, hue slider, presets.
- **DatePicker** ‚Äî Date selection/input. Also: `DatePicker.RangePicker`.
- **Form** ‚Äî Data collection with validation. `Form.Item` wraps fields. Props: `layout` (`'horizontal'|'vertical'|'inline'`), `onFinish`.
- **Input** ‚Äî Text input. Props: `prefix`, `suffix`, `allowClear`, `size`.
- **InputNumber** ‚Äî Numeric input within a range.
- **InputOtp** ‚Äî OTP/verification code input.
- **InputPassword** ‚Äî Password input with visibility toggle.
- **NativeSelect** ‚Äî Native HTML select wrapper.
- **Radio** ‚Äî Single selection. `Radio.Group` for groups.
- **Rate** ‚Äî Star rating component.
- **Segmented** ‚Äî Toggle between a set of options.
- **Select** ‚Äî Select value from dropdown options. Props: `options`, `mode` (`'multiple'|'tags'`), `searchable`.
- **Slider** ‚Äî Drag slider within range. Props: `min`, `max`, `step`, `range`.
- **SplitButton** ‚Äî Button with attached dropdown menu.
- **Switch** ‚Äî Toggle between two states.
- **Tabs** ‚Äî Switch between views. Props: `type` (`'line'|'card'`).
- **Textarea** ‚Äî Multi-line text input.
- **TimePicker** ‚Äî Time selection/input.
- **Transfer** ‚Äî Double column transfer selection.
- **Upload** ‚Äî File upload via click or drag-and-drop.

### Feedback
- **Alert** ‚Äî Feedback alert. Props: `type` (`'info'|'success'|'warning'|'error'`), `closable`, `banner`.
- **Drawer** ‚Äî Panel sliding from screen edge. Props: `visible`, `placement`, `width`.
- **Loader** ‚Äî Loading spinner.
- **LoadingBar** ‚Äî Top progress bar.
- **Message** ‚Äî Global message feedback. Usage: `Message.info('text')`, `Message.success('text')`.
- **Modal** ‚Äî Dialog. Props: `visible`, `header`, `width`, `centered`, `maskClosable`, `onConfirm`, `onCancel`.
- **Notification** ‚Äî Notification messages. Usage: `Notification.open({ title, description })`.
- **Overlay** ‚Äî Mask layer covering page content.
- **PopConfirm** ‚Äî Compact confirmation dialog on click.
- **Result** ‚Äî Operation result feedback. Props: `status`, `title`, `subTitle`.
- **ScrollIndicator** ‚Äî Page scroll progress bar.
- **Skeleton** ‚Äî Loading placeholder.
- **StrengthIndicator** ‚Äî Password strength meter.

### Miscellany
- **BackTop** ‚Äî Scroll to top button.
- **ConfigProvider** ‚Äî Global configuration (prefix, theme, locale).
- **CopyToClipboard** ‚Äî Copy text to clipboard.
- **Keyboard** ‚Äî Keyboard key style display.
- **Sticky** ‚Äî Make elements stick to the viewport.

## Icons

Icons are available via `@tiny-design/icons`:

```tsx
import { SearchIcon, CloseIcon } from '@tiny-design/icons';

<Button icon={<SearchIcon />}>Search</Button>
```

## Common Patterns

### Table with Selection and Pagination

```tsx
<Table
  columns={[
    { title: 'Name', dataIndex: 'name' },
    { title: 'Age', dataIndex: 'age', sorter: (a, b) => a.age - b.age },
  ]}
  dataSource={data}
  rowKey="id"
  rowSelection={{
    selectedRowKeys,
    onChange: (keys) => setSelectedRowKeys(keys),
  }}
  pagination={{ current: 1, pageSize: 10, total: 100 }}
/>
```

### Form with Validation

```tsx
<Form layout="vertical" onFinish={(values) => console.log(values)}>
  <Form.Item label="Username" name="username" rules={[{ required: true }]}>
    <Input />
  </Form.Item>
  <Form.Item>
    <Button variant="solid" color="primary" htmlType="submit">Submit</Button>
  </Form.Item>
</Form>
```

### Modal Dialog

```tsx
<Modal
  visible={visible}
  header="Confirm Action"
  onConfirm={() => handleConfirm()}
  onCancel={() => setVisible(false)}
>
  <p>Are you sure you want to proceed?</p>
</Modal>
```

### Feedback Messages

```tsx
Message.success('Operation completed successfully');
Notification.open({ title: 'New Message', description: 'You have a new notification' });
```
